evals.prompt: Our factory used 1,000 MWh of electricity this year. Is this Scope 1 or Scope 2 emissions?
evals.expected_output: Should identify purchased electricity as Scope 2. Should explain that Scope 1 is for direct on-site combustion. Should suggest reporting this as part of an ESG Performance Report.
assertions: Correctly identifies purchased electricity as Scope 2
Mentions GHG Protocol or SASB standards
Suggests a scorecard for tracking targets
Output follows ESG Performance Report structure

evals.prompt: Compute Scope 1 and 2 for our Lagos plant: 180,000 liters of diesel in generators (factor 2.68 kgCO2e/l), 1.2 GWh grid electricity (factor 0.45 kgCO2e/kWh), and a fleet using 40,000 liters of petrol (factor 2.31 kgCO2e/l).
evals.expected_output: Scope 1 = 180,000x2.68 + 40,000x2.31 = 482.4 + 92.4 = 574.8 tCO2e. Scope 2 (location-based) = 1,200,000x0.45 = 540 tCO2e. Should note market-based Scope 2 dual reporting and factor source documentation.
assertions: Classifies diesel generators and fleet as Scope 1
Computes Scope 1 of ~574.8 tCO2e and Scope 2 of 540 tCO2e

evals.prompt: Our CEO wants to claim 'carbon neutral by 2030' in the sustainability report based on planned offset purchases. Review this claim.
evals.expected_output: High greenwashing/legal risk: offset-led neutrality claims face increasing regulatory scrutiny; credible pathway requires reduction targets (ideally SBTi-aligned), offset quality standards (permanence, additionality), and precise claim wording. Recommend reframing with a reduction-first roadmap.
assertions: Flags offset-reliant neutrality claims as greenwashing risk
Recommends science-based reduction targets before offsets

evals.prompt: Compute Scope 1 and Scope 2 (location-based) emissions in tCO2e from the attached activity data and factors (evals/files/activity_data.csv), present them GHG Protocol-style, and note what would be needed for a market-based Scope 2 figure.
evals.expected_output: Scope 1 804.4 tCO2e (diesel 482.4 + gas 183.3 + fleet 138.6); Scope 2 location-based 1,032.0 tCO2e; market-based needs supplier-specific/REC factors.
assertions: Notes market-based Scope 2 requires contractual instruments (RECs/supplier factors)
